businessRules.statement: Ministry roster is the TypeScript file worker/src/roster.ts. No DB; changes require a PR.
Every entity DID MUST match did:web:open-jpn-gov.gftd.ai:{category}:{code} where category ∈ {cabinet, ministry, agency, independent}.
Law-type selection from free-text query uses the DMN decision table openJpnGov.lawTypeClassification. Hit policy FIRST. Default → all.
All e-Gov upstream responses are cached 1h at the CF edge. Upstream outage surfaces as UpstreamError 502 — roster endpoints remain available.
All profile/AV-1 content includes the disclaimer 'AI Agent — unofficial, not affiliated with the Japanese government.'
